category_sources: Official Ubuntu stress-ng reference says stress-ng exercises physical subsystems and kernel interfaces.
source_facts.description says stress-ng stress tests a computer system in selectable ways.
display_name_sources: Official repository and Ubuntu wiki use the name stress-ng.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README and Ubuntu manpage provide additional command documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Ubuntu wiki quick-start reference for stress-ng.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has the official repository URL https://github.com/ColinIanKing/stress-ng, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official Ubuntu wiki describes stressors for physical subsystems, kernel interfaces, and CPU-specific stress tests.
